mcp.validation_hint: Run the target runtime's MCP status command or inspect the generated .mcp.json-compatible config.

local_wiring: Claude Code MCP: claude mcp list shows agentmemory connected
notes: Use only the locally patched installed binary at ~/.local/bin/agentmemory-mcp for MCP wiring.
The disclosure bundle at /tmp/agentmemory-disclosure-0.9.15 documents vulnerable public 0.9.14 and 0.9.15 artifacts; do not replace the local patched install with npm latest without review.
Keep REST, viewer, and stream ports loopback-only; do not publish private disclosure details.

local_wiring: Agent Skills runtimes: mirror discovered external/anthropic-cybersecurity-skills/skills/* entries into each target's native skill directory.
Droid skills: ~/.factory/skills/<skill-name> when external output is installed.
notes: Required cybersecurity skill pack requested as an external asset.
Only directories containing SKILL.md are emitted; non-skill repository directories are ignored.
